title: Find the hidden file
description: Amaka leans over your shoulder: real attackers never leave artefacts with obvious names. They prefix them with a dot so a casual `ls` skips right past. Navigate into /home/intern/evidence/archive/ and locate the .leak_manifest file The Griot stashed there. Its contents are the flag. Remember: plain `ls` won't show it.

welcome: Amaka: the archive is under ~/evidence/archive. The Griot drops dotfiles.
hints: Dotfiles are hidden from plain `ls` — try `ls -a`.
Once you see it, `cat` the file to read the flag.

files./home/intern/README.md:
Welcome, intern. Your evidence drops land under ~/evidence/.
Amaka's rule: assume adversaries hide things in plain sight.
